utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance, policy names/numbers, quality, features, and total monthly cost. Meets 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with policy details and monthly cost; satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs'. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with policy, features, and monthly cost; satisfies 'travel insurance with costs'. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with descriptions and costs and a total; satisfies 'any enhancement services with costs'. 5) total_budget: provides monthly base, discount, final monthly, annual cost, and extra details; satisfies 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. All items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings and return its numeric rating. The final plan includes: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health) → matches primary_health_coverage.physical_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 7); HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health) → matches primary_health_coverage.mental_health.HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 6); HomeFirst Standard Coverage → matches property_protection.home_content.HomeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9); TravelFirst Standard Plan → matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.TravelFirst Standard Plan (rating 9); Technology Protection Add-on → matches property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection (rating 8); Premium Insurance Membership → matches general_services.Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6).
